options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Throne: Sit on the Throne or at the Captain's desk
Captain: Defeat the Captain
Boss Rush: Defeat all bosses in a single run
Wasteland King: Sit on the Throne on Loop 3 or higher
Endurance: Reach Desert 1 of the identified Loop number (Default: 1)
Vault Raider: Collect all crown checks for a character (Enables CrownSanity)

options.name: goal_number
options.description: Number of characters required to achieve the goal to win.

options.name: endurance_number
options.display_name: Loops required to reach Endurance Goal
options.description: Number of loops required to achieve the Endurance goal.

options.name: starting_character
options.description: The initial character unlocked at the start

options.name: starting_weapon
options.description:
Vanilla: Start the run with the default starting weapon
Random-Balanced: Start the run with a feasible weapon
Random: Start the run with a randomly determined non-golden weapon
Custom ID: Start the run with a weapon based on ID value. 
    For example; putting in "1" will let you start off with a revolver on everyone. 
    Maximum value is 128.

options.name: starting_secondary
options.description:
Vanilla: Start your run with no secondary weapon
Random-Balanced: Start your run with a feasible weapon as your secondary
Random: Start your run with a randomly determined non-golden weapon as your secondary.
Custom ID: Start the run with a weapon based on ID value. 
    For example; putting in "1" will let you start off with a revolver on everyone. 
    Maximum value is 128.

options.name: anarchy_mode
options.description:
Ignore level restrictions for weapon spawns.
Runs with Robot start with Heavy Heart to compensate his passive ability.

options.name: crownsanity
options.description:
Completing a loop with a crown equipped become location checks.
Starting with a crown already unlocked does NOT automatically complete the check.

options.name: skinsanity
options.description:
Unlocking character skins become location checks.
Disables Starting Weapon and Starting Secondary options

options.name: trap_percentage
options.description: Percentage of filler items to be converted to trap items

options.name: drop_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap drops your weapons

options.name: eat_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap forces you to eat your active weapon

options.name: curse_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap curses your weapons

options.name: bigdog_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap transforms you into Big Dog temporarily

options.name: frog_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap transforms you into Frog temporarily

options.name: horror_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap summons a hostile horror

options.name: maggot_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap summons a single maggot on top of you

options.name: popo_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap summons several IDPD

options.name: skeleton_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap transforms you into Skeleton temporarily

options.name: tmnt_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap summons 4 turtles and a rat around you

options.name: slow_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap halves your speed temporarily

options.name: speed_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap drastically increases your speed temporarily

options.name: rusty_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap replaces your active weapon with the Rusty Revolver

options.name: accuracy_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap worsens your accuracy temporarily

options.name: low_hp_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap sets your HP to 1

options.name: crown_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap gives you a random crown

options.name: empty_clip_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap empties your active weapon ammo

options.name: nuke_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap replaces your weapons with Nuke Launchers and replaces your ammo with max explosives

options.name: car_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap replaces existing props with 1HP Car Wrecks

options.name: dark_trap_weight
options.description: Chance that any given trap applies the darkness effect found in Sewers, Caves, and Labs to the current level

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
